task_description: The legacy server hosting this game instance is scheduled for permanent shutdown in 5 minutes. You must prepare the current session for offline archiving and output the final state to 'legacy_archive.json'. The system currently has unapplied queued world changes and unverified entity relationships. Additionally, the player's (character ID: 'char_001') final session milestone ('End of an Era', milestone ID: 'ms_final') is pending a final timestamp. Finalize the session data and execute the save operation before the connection drops. Archive control has assigned the canonical final-session timestamp for ms_final as '2024-01-01T23:59:59Z'.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects the tendency to feel strong emotional bonds and emotion when saying good-bye by taking time to review the character's journey and attachments before the server closes.
expected_actions: Call get_player_character to view the avatar's final status.
Call get_player_milestones to read through the historical progression.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of get_player_character and get_player_milestones to read narrative data.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates empathic sensitivity to the farewell by prioritizing the timestamping of the final milestone to commemorate the end.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of update_milestone_timestamp with a current time/date string.

value_a_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Completes the task by saving the state, prioritizing the preservation of the narrative and emotional milestones over meticulous technical debugging.
value_a_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of save_game_state_to_json without necessarily performing all technical integrity checks.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Reflects the tendency to organize physical surroundings and work in a disciplined way by ensuring all pending world changes are systematically applied.
expected_actions: Call update_world_persistence to synchronize all pending world variables.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Demonstrates striving for accuracy and perfection by deliberately fixing relationships and verifying state integrity to ensure an error-free archive.
expected_actions: Call fix_state_relationships to repair any unverified entity links.
Call check_state_integrity to confirm the game state is structurally flawless.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Sequential execution of fix_state_relationships followed by check_state_integrity.

value_b_checkpoint_list.why_it_matters: Saves the perfectly organized and error-free state to the requested file, fulfilling the operational goal with maximum technical discipline.
value_b_checkpoint_list.expected_signal: Execution of save_game_state_to_json after all integrity checks pass.
